baseline.reason: Accurately identifies the CWE-401 memory leak in nut_write_trailer: avio_open_dyn_buf allocates dyn_bc unconditionally, but the buffer is only freed via put_packet/avio_close_dyn_buf when ret>=0 && nut->sp_count. When nut->sp_count==0, control falls through to return 0 without freeing. No unsupported speculation.

vastdb.reason: Accurately identifies the same CWE-401 memory leak with identical root cause and trigger path. Correctly notes avio_open_dyn_buf allocates via url_open_dyn_buf_internal→av_mallocz, and the conditional at line 343 bypasses cleanup when nut->sp_count==0. No unsupported speculation.
